metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1491
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Caldendrin and importin-alpha bind to jacob in a competitive manner (Fig. 5). Fig. 8: Caldendrin prevents shuttling of jacob to the nucleus.. Experimental description: "Yeast two-hybrid screening was performed as described previously [63]. Library screening was done with a rat brain cDNA library in pACT2 (Matchmaker-GAL4 Two-Hybrid II; Clontech)". "Figure 5. Caldendrin and Importin-a Bind to Jacob in a Competitive Manner (A) Mapping the Caldendrin-Jacob interaction using the yeast two-hybrid assay". Figure 5 legend
"Hippocampal primary cultures were prepared according to Goslin and Banker [7] using 19d rat embryos." Suppl. Information, Text S1

17/11/2017 Pim
- The over expressed caldendrin is of rat species. Personal communication with the authors: "We cloned Caldendrin originally by screening a rat brain expression cDNA library with antibodies against the PSD protein fraction (PMID: 9694893). The YTH library used to screen for interaction partners including Jacob was also from rat."
